Main: TWFE (cluster): Preferred two-way fixed effects estimate with clustered SEs.
No controls: Alternative control set with no country or year fixed effects.
Country FE only: Alternative control set with country fixed effects only.
Year FE only: Alternative control set with year fixed effects only.
Log Fertility (TWFE): Alternative functional form using log fertility.
Drop extreme fertility: Alternative sample dropping the top and bottom 5% of fertility values.
